hook: A non-diabetic CGM coach that turns your daily glucose curve into a one-line action.
core_problem: 100M+ US adults are pre-diabetic or insulin-resistant; CGMs (Levels, Nutrisense) drown users in graphs without action.
ai_leverage: Curve-pattern agent classifies meal/sleep/exercise responses; coaching agent prescribes one daily change with measurable target.
monetization_logic: $199/mo coaching + Rx CGM cost (operator-supplied or insurance).
distribution_strategy: MD partnerships + employer wellness benefits; PLG via free 'glucose curve from photo' wedge.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user food/sleep/exercise → glucose response corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: Rx + sensor supply + insurance coverage gate; coaching scales via API.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C health-conscious. Stage 2: insurer + employer bundle. Stage 3: full metabolic-health platform with longevity outcomes.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + FDA labeling for wellness vs medical claims
fake_ai_trap: clinician reviews any prescriptive change
validation_invocation: Per-user metabolic data is asymmetric; food + activity apps see only inputs.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Dexcom/Abbott API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user CGM + food + sleep + activity corpus.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician approves any new coaching protocol; user approves any data sharing.

ui_ux_invocation: User snaps a meal photo; agent predicts spike and suggests a tweak; daily action delivered as a single notification.

hook: An athlete recovery HUD that tells you the right warmup and the right wattage today.
core_problem: 60M serious amateur athletes train without recovery science; Whoop/Oura give scores, not prescriptions.
ai_leverage: Recovery agent fuses HRV, sleep, soreness, training load; prescription agent sets workout intensity + warmup.
retention_loop: Per-athlete response corpus + coach integration lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-athlete training load + recovery response corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: amateur athletes. Stage 2: pro teams + colleges. Stage 3: full performance OS for athletic departments.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the prescription engine, not a UI on Whoop
commoditization_collapse: depth + coach integration
validation_invocation: Per-athlete response data is asymmetric; wearables see only physiology.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Whoop/Oura/Garmin API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-athlete HRV + sleep + training load + perceived exertion.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Certified coach reviews any extreme intensity change; athlete approves coach access.

ui_ux_invocation: Athlete asks 'how should I train today'; agent answers with intensity + warmup.

hook: A smart ring that calls your daughter when grandma's heart rhythm flags afib — without her knowing she's wearing a med device.
core_problem: 55M US adults 65+; afib detection is gated by Apple Watch; many won't wear a watch.
ai_leverage: PPG-rhythm agent classifies afib + falls; family agent notifies adult children with severity + context.
distribution_strategy: Adult-children D2C + Medicare Advantage health-plan bundles.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-elder PPG corpus + family network compounds.

scalability_rationale: Hardware + FDA pathway gate; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + insurer bundle. Stage 2: senior living. Stage 3: full ambient health-monitoring OS for elders.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA SaMD pathway scoped
hardware_scaling_chasm: contract manufacturer + OEM ring partnership
validation_invocation: FDA + insurance moat compounds; reject vanity ring sales.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician reviews any afib alert before ER notification.

ui_ux_invocation: Elder wears the ring; family gets alerts only when warranted.

hook: A posture coach that buzzes you back into shape before lower-back pain becomes a $5k MRI.
core_problem: 85M US desk workers report chronic back pain; wearable posture coaches (Upright) lacked ML personalization and adoption fell off.
ai_leverage: IMU agent classifies posture + movement; coaching agent personalizes haptic intensity + frequency.
retention_loop: Per-user posture pattern + coaching history lock.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: corporate wellness. Stage 2: chiropractor + PT bundle. Stage 3: musculoskeletal health platform.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the coaching personalization engine
market_timing_failure: pain is structural, not pandemic-driven
validation_invocation: Defensible coaching brand + corporate wellness retention.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user IMU traces, exercise compliance, pain reports.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: PT reviews any exercise prescription change.

ui_ux_invocation: User wears device; haptic gently corrects in real time; weekly digest in app.

hook: A baby sleep wearable that nudges parents to act 30 seconds before the wake-up cry.
core_problem: 4M US new-parent households face brutal sleep deprivation; existing monitors (Owlet, Nanit) alert during, not before.
ai_leverage: Sleep-stage agent classifies via HR + sound; intervention agent suggests action before transition (room temp, white noise, swaddle re-tuck).

moat_potential.rationale: Per-baby sleep corpus + parent action outcome data is unique.

scalability_rationale: Hardware install gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: 0-12 mo. Stage 2: toddler + child-development OS. Stage 3: pediatric care + insurer bundle.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA SaMD scoped + AAP guidelines
fake_ai_trap: pediatric advisor reviews any prescriptive intervention

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-baby HR + sound + motion + parent action outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Pediatric advisor approves any new intervention protocol.

ui_ux_invocation: Parent gets a soft voice prompt 'rock now, 10 seconds, soft'.

hook: A breath regulator wearable that drops your cortisol before you snap at a coworker.
core_problem: 200M+ knowledge workers face daily acute stress; meditation apps (Calm, Headspace) require time + intent that stressed people don't have.
ai_leverage: HRV + skin-conductance agent detects stress onset; intervention agent triggers haptic-paced breathing.
monetization_logic: $199 device + $8/mo subscription; corporate wellness $4/mo per employee.
retention_loop: Per-user stress signature + intervention success lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user stress + intervention corpus improves recommendations.

scalability_rationale: Hardware + B2B wellness channel scales fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + corporate wellness. Stage 2: clinical anxiety adjunct (FDA-cleared). Stage 3: full nervous-system regulation platform.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA wellness vs medical claim boundary
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the intervention engine

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user HRV + skin conductance + intervention outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; HIPAA-aligned for corporate wellness.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinical advisor approves any intervention protocol change.

ui_ux_invocation: Wearable buzzes gently; user breathes with the haptic; cortisol drops.

hook: An industrial safety vest that detects a fall + heat-stress + dropped tool before OSHA does.
core_problem: 5M US construction + warehouse workers face injury rates 3x national avg; existing vests are reflective fabric, not telemetry.
ai_leverage: IMU + temperature + sound agent classifies events; safety agent notifies foreman + emergency contacts.
distribution_strategy: GC + insurance carrier partnerships; OSHA-aligned compliance pitch.

moat_potential.rationale: OSHA + insurance partnership creates switching cost.

scalability_rationale: Hardware install gates; B2B sales scale.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: construction + warehouse. Stage 2: utility + oilfield. Stage 3: full industrial workforce safety OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: OSHA + state worker-comp rules
hardware_scaling_chasm: contract manufacturer + apparel OEM
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for industrial safety; workers + GCs + insurers all benefit.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-worker telemetry, incident corpus, OSHA records.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Safety officer reviews any incident escalation.

ui_ux_invocation: Worker wears vest; foreman gets alert only when warranted.

hook: Headphones that adapt focus music to your concentration level in real time.
core_problem: 200M+ focus-music listeners use generic playlists; brain-music research (Brain.fm) is preset-driven.
ai_leverage: EEG-on-headphone + interaction agent classifies focus state; music agent adapts tempo + complexity.
retention_loop: Per-user focus signature + music response corpus lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user EEG + music response corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C focus. Stage 2: ADHD + meditation adjunct. Stage 3: full neurofeedback wellness platform.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA wellness vs medical claim boundary
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the EEG + music adaptation engine
validation_invocation: Per-user EEG + music-response data is asymmetric; preset apps are blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Embedded + React Native + Python + Postgres + custom DSP
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinical advisor reviews any new protocol.

ui_ux_invocation: User puts on headphones; music adapts; focus session logged.

hook: A smart insole that prevents diabetic foot ulcers — the most expensive complication in healthcare.
core_problem: 5M US diabetics develop foot ulcers/yr; treatment cost $9-25k each; existing insoles (Orpyx, Siren) struggle with adoption.
ai_leverage: Pressure-temp agent detects pre-ulcer hot spots; alert agent notifies user + endocrinologist.
distribution_strategy: Endocrinologist + podiatrist partnerships + Medicare Advantage carriers.
retention_loop: Per-patient foot signature + clinician relationship lock.

moat_potential.rationale: FDA cleared + insurance reimbursement creates switching cost.

scalability_rationale: Clinical + insurance partnerships gate; hardware established.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: diabetic foot. Stage 2: peripheral artery disease. Stage 3: full endocrinology OS bundled with care.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FDA + CMS reimbursement codes scoped
fake_ai_trap: clinician reviews any escalation
validation_invocation: FDA + reimbursement moat + outcome guarantees; reject vanity device sales.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Embedded + Python + Postgres + AWS IoT + EHR integration
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-patient pressure-temp, ulcer corpus, outcome data.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician reviews any 'high risk' flag before patient notification.

ui_ux_invocation: Patient wears insole; clinician notified silently before ulcer forms.

hook: AR glasses that whisper a name + last conversation when you re-meet someone at a party.
core_problem: Memory + social anxiety affects 100M+ adults; existing tools (Notion, Roam) require active note-taking.
ai_leverage: Vision agent identifies known faces (opt-in); memory agent surfaces last conversation + relationship context to AR display.
distribution_strategy: Professional networks + AR-headset OEM partnerships (Meta Ray-Ban, Apple Vision).
retention_loop: Per-user social graph + memory corpus lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Personal social graph + memory corpus is account-locked.

scalability_rationale: AR glasses adoption is the gating constraint.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: professionals + execs. Stage 2: people-with-memory-conditions. Stage 3: full social-memory OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: BIPA + state biometric privacy laws (Illinois, Texas)
fake_ai_trap: opt-in only; transparent face-data retention
validation_invocation: Personal social graph is asymmetric; networking tools see only LinkedIn.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: AR SDK + Python + Postgres + custom face embeddings
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user opt-in face embeddings, conversation memory, relationship metadata.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + KMS; on-device-first inference; per-state privacy compliance.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Privacy officer reviews data retention; user controls who is memorized.

ui_ux_invocation: User looks at someone; AR shows name + last topic + 'they're back from Lisbon trip'.
